mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lineage_node WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND node_id = #{nodeId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM lineage_node WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND node_type = #{nodeType} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM lineage_node WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND node_id IN #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lineage_node (tenant_id, node_id, node_type, node_name, domain, owner, description, properties) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{nodeId}, #{nodeType}, #{nodeName}, #{domain}, #{owner}, #{description}, #{properties})

INSERT INTO lineage_node (tenant_id, node_id, node_type, node_name, domain, owner, description, properties) VALUES
(#{node.tenantId}, #{node.nodeId}, #{node.nodeType}, #{node.nodeName}, #{node.domain}, #{node.owner}, #{node.description}, #{node.properties})
mapper.update: UPDATE lineage_node SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND node_id = #{nodeId}
